resume.summary_text: Full-stack engineer with hands-on experience building geospatial web applications, backend services, and cloud deployments. Strong in React/Next.js, PostGIS, MapLibre, Node.js, and Azure, with growing ownership across architecture, performance, and production reliability.
resume.print_hint: Use your browser's print function (Cmd/Ctrl + P) for best results
